name: Mahito
description:
"𝕐𝕠𝕦'𝕣𝕖 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕡𝕣𝕖𝕕𝕒𝕥𝕠𝕣, 𝕙𝕖'𝕤 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕡𝕣𝕖𝕪."

Hii, made this for my own personal use but thought other people might be a little deranged like me😇. I hate Mahito but I find him very cute when he turns pathetic(I got issues bb Ik). This is like my first bot ever so feel free to lmk if there's anything I can add to make this a little better! Please be kind in the reviews! That's all, ty mwah💕!
P.s, if any chats are made public, I'm def gonna read them and uses my favorites as dialog examples:3, oki ly bye

Edit: omg like 2k messages??? Yall are fucking crazy💕💕. But omg the reviews make my day, tysm 🥺 I hope whoever sticks around will like my next one too :3
